name: Graphic Marbles 图形弹珠
short_description: Reasonably utilize various marbles and demonstrate your superb operational skills to destroy more targets!!
detailed_description:
This is a game of marbles hitting bricks. Reasonably utilize various marbles and plan energy values to achieve more destruction rates within a limited number of turns.

Game features

1. The game has over 20 different mechanisms of marbles, each of which consumes different amounts of energy. Each level will have fixed pre made marbles, while additional marbles will be randomly obtained.

2. After completing each level, you will receive a gold coin reward, and the number of rewards depends on the destruction rate. The highest destruction rate is 90%. Using coins can purchase some attribute enhancements.

3. There are multiple different themes and levels in the game, which will randomly enter the theme or level.
